description_cn:
使点具有磁力，与指定距离范围内的点互相吸引。

根据接近度将点对齐。
description_en:
Make a point magnetic, so that it attracts points within a specified distance range.

Align the points based on their proximity.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.desc_cn: 点之间要套用的点列表
parameters.desc_en: List of points to apply snap between

parameters.name: R
parameters.desc_en: The distance at which the snap activates

author: Kangaroo Team
